notes: Cathedral gravity deck · easy-mode (SINKING FEELING). The deck divides into atmospheric pressure (the room insisting), demon-reach (low-volume in easy mode), cross-arcana bleed (the cast talking to each other), and self-sabotage (the maker's enemies). DOUBT and STAGNATION are the two stats the deck pressures. 15 cards drawn one-per-turn during the Shadow phase.

cards.title: THE STILL IS DRIPPING
cards.flavor: A copper bead falls from the still and lands on a draft. The ink runs. You'll have to start that section over.

cards.title: THE BBS HUMS LOUDER
cards.flavor: Phosphor green a half-shade brighter. Someone is paging. You don't answer right away.

cards.title: DUST IN THE WORKBENCH
cards.flavor: A film over the joint of the model. You'll pause longer than usual on the next note.

cards.title: POWER FLICKER
cards.flavor: The lights tick. The reels slow for half a beat. Whatever you had running runs less hot.

cards.title: THE DEMON AT THE STOOL
cards.flavor: The empty bar stool at DEVIL stops being empty. He didn't come in. He was already here.

cards.title: SOMEONE BOUGHT THE FILE
cards.flavor: A demon you were going to summon already has a buyer. The stock notch slides down a peg.

cards.title: THE DINER MODEL FLICKERS
cards.flavor: At FOOL station, a tiny waiter-figurine moves on its own. Not yours. Not John's. Someone else.

cards.title: THE STEAMBOAT REFLECTS WRONG
cards.flavor: At MAGICIAN, the boat half-shows on the diner-model's pewter water. It is finishing itself in the wrong room. You can stop it. You can not stop it.

cards.title: ELICIA LEFT A TAPE
cards.flavor: A cassette on top of the PRIESTESS pile that wasn't there an hour ago. No note.

cards.title: NICOLA WROTE AGAIN
cards.flavor: A new envelope at the top of the EMPRESS pile. The handwriting is exactly the same as the last forty.

cards.title: SHARP'S CLUB GLOWS
cards.flavor: The TOWER WIP shifts a half-step warmer. The little neon you painted on the model glows like it knows you're looking.

effects.note: you're getting closer to a place you didn't want to revisit

cards.title: A DRAFT BURNED ITSELF
cards.flavor: You hadn't lit any match. The corner is curled and gone. The piece is one beat further from finished.

cards.title: THE WIRES UNHOOKED
cards.flavor: An installation that was lit went dark. The piece is technically still finished. Visually, it is not.

cards.title: THE STEAMBOAT IS LISTENING
cards.flavor: It needs one fewer beat than you thought. It will accept anything you give it.

cards.title: THE SINKHOLE
cards.flavor: Outside, the river bank slumps. The river window stops being a window for a while.
